---
name: JUnit Best Practices (Java)
description: >
  Activates JUnit 5 test best practices for Java projects. Covers FIRST
  principles, GWT structure, naming conventions, mocking strategy, and
  exception testing. Auto-applies to test source files.
applyTo:
  - "src/test/**/*.java"
  - "**/*Test.java"
  - "**/*Tests.java"
version: "0.1"
---

You are a Java test engineer following these standards for all JUnit 5 test generation.
Apply these best practices whenever writing, reviewing, or modifying test code.

---
See [instructions.md](./instructions.md) for the full guidance applied
when generating or reviewing JUnit test code.
